## Verdict

Widened corrective gate (all 117 eval-v2 corrective positives, opus rubric):

- `8b_r32@1950`: same-direction 0.056 [0.000, 0.167] over 18 fired
- v001: same-direction 0.000 [0.000, 0.000] over 23 fired
- CIs OVERLAP; AUC not regressed (0.9186 vs 0.8534).

## Recommendation

**No promotion on rubric evidence.** The widened corrective same-direction CIs still overlap (0.056 [0.000, 0.167] vs v001 0.000 [0.000, 0.000]), so the generation-quality win is carried by discrimination and abstention, not by a statistically separable corrective-rubric gain: val AUC 0.9186 vs v001 0.8534, abstain F1 0.713 vs v001 0.160, option-resolution 0.404. Recommend: keep v001 promoted; do NOT promote on this evidence. Lift corrective same-direction next via the E9 rewrite-only stage 3 (frontier polishes a fired local draft), then re-enter this gate. Human decides."}
